description: Recto (secondary use): Book list in rudimentary hand and spelling. Mentions books such as Kitāb al-Wadīʿa; the book of Lamentations; Tehillot (= Tehillim?); a book of jurisprudence (פיקה); a tafsīr on Daniʾel; the book of Job; a book of "Alfāẓ"; Kitāb al-Aflāk; Kitāb al-Wakāla.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
